zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan FitzAlan於1238年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Brian FitzAlan48歲，母親Alice Hansard32歲。他和Agnes FitzRandolph至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1276年5月17日之前，埋葬在英國越可爾貝達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan FitzAlan于1238年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Brian FitzAlan48岁，母亲Alice Hansard32岁。他和Agnes FitzRandolph至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1276年5月17日之前，埋葬在英国越可爾貝達爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan FitzAlan was born in 1238, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Brian FitzAlan, was 48 and his mother, Alice Hansard, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes FitzRandolph. He died before 17 May 1276, and was buried in Bedale, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan FitzAlan est né en 1238, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Brian FitzAlan, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Hansard, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes FitzRandolph. Il est décédé avant 17 mai 1276, et a été enterré à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan FitzAlan 1238 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Brian FitzAlan 48 und seine Mutter Alice Hansard 32. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzRandolph mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 17. Mai 1276 und wurde in Bedale, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan FitzAlan è nato il nel 1238 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Brian FitzAlan, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hansard, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Agnes FitzRandolph. Morì prima del 17 maggio 1276, e fu sepolto a Bedale, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan FitzAlanが1238年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Brian FitzAlanは48歳，母Alice Hansardは32歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzRandolphとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1276年5月17日以前に死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアベダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan FitzAlan(이)가 1238년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Brian FitzAlan(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hansard(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzRandolph(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 5월 17일 이전 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 베데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan FitzAlan nasceu em 1238, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Brian FitzAlan, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hansard, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Agnes FitzRandolph. Ele faleceu antes 17 de maio de 1276, e foi sepultado em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan FitzAlan родился в 1238 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Brian FitzAlan было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hansard, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Agnes FitzRandolph. Он умер перед 17 май 1276 г. и был похоронен в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan FitzAlan nació en 1238, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Brian FitzAlan, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice Hansard, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Agnes FitzRandolph. Murió antes de 17 de mayo de 1276, y fue sepultado en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
